zh.Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可
zh.Borthwick, Edinburgh, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick於大約1445年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，他的父親William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick35歲，母親Mariote De Hoppringill21歲。他和Mariote De Hoppringill至少有1個兒子。他於1471年被列為ambassador to england。他去世於1503年5月20日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可。

zh-hans.Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可
zh-hans.Borthwick, Edinburgh, Scotland: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick于大约1445年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可时，他的父亲William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick35岁，母亲Mariote De Hoppringill21岁。他和Mariote De Hoppringill至少有1个儿子。他于1471年被列为ambassador to england。他去世于1503年5月20日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick was born about 1445, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick, was 35 and his mother, Mariote De Hoppringill, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Mariote De Hoppringill. In 1471, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as ambassador to england. He died on 20 May 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick est né environ 1445, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mariote De Hoppringill, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mariote De Hoppringill. En 1471, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est ambassador to england. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick um 1445 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick 35 und seine Mutter Mariote De Hoppringill 21. Er hatte mit Mariote De Hoppringill mindestens 1 Sohn. 1471, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als ambassador to england aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Mai 1503 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick è nato il circa 1445 nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mariote De Hoppringill, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mariote De Hoppringill. Nel 1471, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come ambassador to england. Morì il 20 maggio 1503, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland: スコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィック
ja.Borthwick, Edinburgh, Scotland: イギリススコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィック
ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwickが約1445年にスコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwickは35歳，母Mariote De Hoppringillは21歳であった。彼はMariote De Hoppringillとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1471年，27歳の時，職業はambassador to englandと記録されている。彼は1503年5月20日に故郷で59歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick(이)가 대략 1445년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariote De Hoppringill(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mariote De Hoppringill(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1471년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 ambassador to england이었다. 그는 1503년 5월 20일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에 묻혔다.

mn.Borthwick, Edinburgh, Scotland: Borthwick, Edinburghshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mariote De Hoppringill, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mariote De Hoppringill. Em 1471, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como ambassador to england. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1503, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick родился около 1445 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariote De Hoppringill, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mariote De Hoppringill. В 1471 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии ambassador to england. Он умер 20 мая 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick nació aproximadamente 1445, en Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mariote De Hoppringill, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mariote De Hoppringill. En 1471, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era ambassador to england. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1503, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland.
